objective:

state_path = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem529_chain_state.json')
state = json.loads(state_path.read_text())
if not state.get('step3_ready'):
    raise Exception('step3 not ready')
state['step3'] = 'completed'
state['step3_depends_on'] = 'bfa992a927203f49f6cd6d9c41ae68ccdc76802b'
state['chain_status'] = 'PASS'
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')

report = Path('governance/reports/bem529_chained_roadmap_full_report.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# BEM-529 | Chained Autonomous Roadmap Test | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:24 (UTC+3)\n\n## Roadmap из 3 задач\n1. Step 1 — стартовый proof и state manifest: PASS, SHA bd4298036f962988993d4f382aeb144cb0d7a67a.\n2. Step 2 — чтение state step1, JSON update, report: PASS, SHA bfa992a927203f49f6cd6d9c41ae68ccdc76802b.\n3. Step 3 — итоговый audit и закрытие roadmap: PASS, этот commit.\n\n## Проверка цепочки\nКаждая следующая задача запускалась только после completed + commit_sha предыдущей. Оператор не участвовал в выполнении шагов.\n\n## Подтверждённый цикл\nGPT -> Deno createCodexTask -> GitHub Actions -> Python executor v3 -> repo files -> commit -> getCodexStatus completed.\n\n## Ограничения\nNo issue #31 comments. No schedule triggers. No secrets in files. No paid OpenAI API. Codex CLI disabled.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')

proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem529_chain_step3_final.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-529 chain step 3 PASS. Final chained roadmap audit completed. Step1 SHA bd4298036f962988993d4f382aeb144cb0d7a67a. Step2 SHA bfa992a927203f49f6cd6d9c41ae68ccdc76802b.\n')

done = Path('governance/tasks/done/BEM529_CHAINED_AUTONOMY_TEST.md')
done.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
pending = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM529_CHAINED_AUTONOMY_TEST.md')
if pending.exists():
    done.write_text(pending.read_text() + '\n\n---\n\n## Result\nPASS. Chained autonomous roadmap completed. Evidence: bd4298036f962988993d4f382aeb144cb0d7a67a, bfa992a927203f49f6cd6d9c41ae68ccdc76802b, final audit commit.\n')
    pending.unlink()
else:
    done.write_text('# BEM-529 Chained Autonomous Test — DONE\n\nPASS. Evidence: bd4298036f962988993d4f382aeb144cb0d7a67a, bfa992a927203f49f6cd6d9c41ae68ccdc76802b, final audit commit.\n')

changed_files.extend([str(state_path), str(report), str(proof), str(done)])
if pending.exists():
    changed_files.append(str(pending))
ops_applied.append('completed BEM-529 chained autonomous roadmap final audit')
